headline: Marriott International (MAR) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: Marriott (MAR) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Noble Investment Group acquires 10-property upscale select-service, extended stay portfolio
summary: The deal, including Marriott, Hilton and IHG hotels, furthers Noble’s investment in the high-demand and durable categories.
